items.body:
No API design or tooling issues found. The package version (`1.0.0-beta.2`) is consistent across `package.json`, `src/api/fluxConfigurationContext.ts`, and `CHANGELOG.md`. No alpha versions are present anywhere. Breaking changes are properly documented in the CHANGELOG. The public API surface has no naming violations, no misuse of `unknown`, and no inappropriate `void` returns. CI (`js - pullrequest`) passed successfully.
